title: selago innata
intro: Selago innata, also known as Cape gentian, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selago innata include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote relaxation, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Selago innata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
